name: The Musashino Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Musashino Bank, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides banking products and financial services in Japan. It offers deposits, loans, loan guarantees, and credit cards, as well as financial instruments, asset management, inheritance-related, business succession support, installment-payment, and auto and general leasing services. The company also engages in the development, sale, and maintenance of computer systems; research of regional economy; management support for venture businesses; holding of seminars; and outsourcing of operational business. In addition, it offers consultation and information services. As of June 30, 2020, the company operated 99 branches and 9 mortgage loan centers. The Musashino Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.
